generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While the government pushes for more civil defense spending, experts warn that over-preparation can actually make us LESS safe. Heavy investments in shelters and stockpiles divert resources from real threats like cyber warfare and AI-driven disinformation. We need a smarter, more balanced approach to security. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense #SmartSpending
